data.title: A Look Into TJX Companies Inc's Price Over Earnings
The Stat Explaining Why The Stock Market Gets So Much Negative News Coverage
data.description: The stock market climbed to all-time highs, with the S&P 500 setting an intraday high of 5,878.46 on Thursday and closing high of 5,859.85 on Monday. For the week, the S&P rose 0.8% to end at 5,859.54.

data.title: Elon Musk Pledges $1 Million to Petition Supporters Daily – Experts Question Legal Boundaries
Roper Tech Q3 Earnings: 13% Revenue Growth, Higher Cash Flow, Lifts Full-Year Outlook
data.description: Roper Technologies reported fiscal third-quarter 2024 revenue growth of 13% year-on-year to $1.77 billion.

data.title: Starbucks Fails At Reversing Declining Sales
data.description: On Wednesday, Starbucks (NASDAQ: SBUX) released preliminary fourth quarter results that fell short of estimates as weak U.S. demand resulted in declines in same store sales, net revenue and profit.
